title: The Space Exploration Advisory Committee (SEAC)
body: "The Space Exploration Advisory Committee’s members are external to the UK Space Agency and are expected to represent the views of the community.  It advises the UK Space Agency on the UK’s Space Exploration programme, including participation in European Space Agency programmes and associated national activities, and any other related matters.  Find out more about the Space Exploration Advisory Committee’s members and their careers.  Committee     SEAC role Committee member Role     Chair & HESAC Representative Professor Caroline Smith Head of Collections and Principal Curator of Meteorites, Natural History Museum   Vice Chair & LSWG Representative Professor Karen Olsson-Francis Director of Astrobiology OU, Open University   Mars Science and Exploration Dr Joel Davis Lecturer in Planetary Science, Imperial College London   Microgravity (Life Science) Dr Li Shean Toh Assistant Professor, University of Nottingham   Microgravity (Physical Science) Professor Phil Williams Professor of Biophysics, University of Nottingham   Lunar Science and Exploration Dr Hannah Sargeant Planetary Scientist, University of Leicester   Industry (Large Scale) - Technology Mr Remi Challamel Senior Business Development and Sales Manager, Thales Alenia Space   Industry (SME) - Technology Dr Mark Woods Chief Strategy Officer / Head of Robotics, Autonomy and AI Group, CFMS Services Ltd.   Academia representative - technology Professor Andrea Cammarano Professor in Space Mechanisms, University of Southampton     Early Career Researchers     SEAC role Committee member Role     Mars Early Career Researcher Dr Frances Butcher Leverhulme Early Career Fellow, University of Sheffield   Lunar Early Career Researcher Dr Romain Tartese Senior Lecturer, University of Manchester   Microgravity Early Career Researcher Dr Samantha Jones Postdoctoral Research Associate, University of Liverpool     Working Group (WG) Representatives     SEAC role Committee member Role     UKSpace Space Science and Exploration (SSEC) – Chair Marie-Claire Perkinson Head of Mission and Spacecraft Chief Engineering, Airbus Defence and Space   UKSpace Space Science and Exploration (SSEC) – Vice-Chair Steven Kay Robotics Engineer, GMV   ESA Solar System and Exploration WG (SSEWG) Dr Manish Patel Professor of Planetary Science, The Open University   ESA Physical Science WG (PSWG) Dr Ruth Bamford Senior Research Scientist, UKRI/ STFC/ RAL Space   ESA Physical Science WG (PSWG) Professor Peter Lee Professor of Materials Science, University College London   ESA Life Science WG (LSWG) Professor Damian Bailey Royal Society Wolfson Research Fellow; Professor of Physiology and Biochemistry, University of South Wales   ESA Life Science WG (LSWG) Professor Karen Olsson-Francis Director of Astrobiology OU, The Open University   ESA Human Spaceflight and Exploration Science Advisory Committee (HESAC) Professor Caroline Smith Head of Collections and Principal Curator of Meteorites, Natural History Museum   UK Space Agency Discovery Advisory Committee on Science (DACS) – Chair Vacant -     "
